issue_summary: Contractor asks whether a detail in the drawing should be clarified before quoting or scheduling the related work.

contract_basis.note: Drawing reference must be verified by the contract evidence admin before formal use.

preliminary_assessment: This is an information request. AI PCM may organize the question and suggest evidence to collect, but must not convert the answer into a contract change.
recommended_next_steps: Ask the owner to confirm the intended detail in the platform record.
Route any change or price impact into a separate human-reviewed ticket.

human_review.reason: No payment, change, acceptance, legal, or evidence conflict flag is active in this placeholder sample.
